Log \#17  
Prompt: Take this application and make the following changes: The font is the default Times New Roman, but make the font more on-theme with our slot machine. Also, when the reels are rolling, the icons are too narrow and we want it to fit and show the entire icon. When the results are generated, it shows the entire icon, but it causes the results to overlap with the log boxes. Make it so none of the boxes and contents are overlapping with each other.

Observations:   
🎯 Iteration 17 — What changed  
🎰 Slot Machine Typography  
Replaced the default Times New Roman look  
Updated the app to use a bolder, more casino-style font stack  
Headings, buttons, chips, and result text now feel more on-theme  
🎞️ Reel Icon Sizing  
Adjusted reel icon sizing while reels are spinning  
Icons now sit inside a square visual area instead of stretching too narrow  
Helps keep the full icon visible during the spin animation  
📐 Layout / Overlap Fixes  
Reworked the reel/result area so the result card no longer sits on top of nearby content  
Result messages now open in their own space instead of overlapping the log/rules boxes  
Added better width handling so boxes and their contents stay separated cleanly  
📱 Responsive Layout Improvements  
Adjusted the main cabinet grid proportions  
Made the layout stack earlier on tighter screen widths  
Improves spacing and prevents side panels from crowding the center content  
🧾 History / Content Containment  
Added safer width behavior inside history items and symbol chips  
Prevents text/content inside the log area from pushing into neighboring sections  
⚡ Net Effect  
The slot machine now looks more on-theme  
Reel icons stay more readable while spinning  
Results, logs, and side panels no longer overlap each other  
Layout holds together better across screen sizes  
Verification: npm run check:js and npm test both pass.

Validation:   
No HTML or CSS errors

Visual:   
![][image1]

Improvements: 

* The machine core is still overlapping with score panel  
* Recent spins is scrollable horizontally, but it’s barely visible so maybe move it somewhere  
* “Theme Slot Cabinet” is a barely visible color  
* 5-slot reel cuts off icons still

New Prompt Brainstorming:   
Take this application and make the following changes: The 3-slot reel icons are now fully visible, but the 5-slot reel still cuts off parts of the icons. Could you improve it so it fully sees the icon in the 5-slot reel as well? Also, the “Theme Slot Cabinet” title on the very top is a barely-visible color, so please color it into something more visible (i.e. white). As for the machine core, it is still overlapping with the score panel when the results are generated. Please fix it so that the machine core does not overlap with the score panel. The recent spins are scrollable horizontally, but it’s barely visible so maybe move it somewhere else where we don’t need to scroll and can see the entire thing.

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
